fiveLevelQtp.title: 5-Level QTP Milestones
fiveLevelQtp.blurb: Start within 60 days of date entered 5-skill level upgrade training. Minimum 180 days to complete.

items.topic: Bird/Wildlife Aircraft Strike Hazard (BASH) Reduction Program
Coordinate Airfield Repair Activities & Facilities Maintenance

amosAmslPcg.title: AMOS/AMSL PCG Milestones
amosAmslPcg.blurb: Start this PCG no later than 180 days after the completion of the 5-level QTP. Individuals have 90 days to completed this PCG.

items.topic: Airfield Management Operations Lead/Supervisor Responsibilities/Authority Leadership

sevenLevelQtp.title: 7-Level QTP Milestones
sevenLevelQtp.blurb: Open upon entry to 7-skill level upgrade training. Members have 6 months to complete.

afmPcg.title: Airfield Manager PCG Milestones
afmPcg.blurb: Start upon notification of selection for promotion to Technical Sergeant. 180 days to complete.

jqsCatalogMeta.note1: Use tab for individuals in upgrade training. If previously documented in AFTR or completed using a previous JQS, transcribe IAW the CFETP and attach exported record in file tab.
jqsCatalogMeta.note2: Highlight all JQS tasks that apply to the specific installation in yellow to identify the tasks that are required.
